title: scrophularia chlorantha
intro: Scrophularia chlorantha, also known as Green-flowered Figwort, is a flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia chlorantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
